chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. D- 467 of 2016. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judg 03.03.2022. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. Mr. Ashfaq Hussain Abro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. ~~~~~~~ At the very outset, it is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press disposal of instant petition before this Court on merit, if the respondents No.1 and 2 are directed to dispose of the application of the petitioner, in accordance with law, within sixty days, if it is still pending with them. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ansari
